new_classes.label_en: plum, pear or cherry brandy in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 38)
new_classes.label_de: Pflaumenbrand, Birnenbrand oder Kirschbrand in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2208 90 38)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage obtained exclusively by fermenting and distilling plum, pear or cherry musts (excluding liqueurs), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, classified under CN code 2208 90 38.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the key distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 90 38: (1) it is a subclass of PlumsOrCherriesOrPearsBrandy (excluding liqueurs, inherited from parent); (2) it is presented in containers > 2 L (via LargeContainer part restriction); (3) it is produced from fermented plum, pear or cherry musts (via distillation feedstock and process restrictions); (4) it is disjoint from its sibling CN 2208 90 33 (small containers ≤ 2 L). A small gap remains: the legal text references HS Explanatory Note to heading 0809 for the precise scope of 'plums' and 'cherries', which cannot be fully captured in OWL axioms without importing that heading's definitions. The exclusion of liqueurs is structurally expressed at the parent class level (PlumsOrCherriesOrPearsBrandy) rather than repeated here.
